data.name: Village Slut Transformation 💫
data.detailed_description:
📖 A Story About Change

Take the role of Lily, a young woman whose life changes unexpectedly.

After arriving in Grimwood — a mysterious village cut off from civilization — Lily finds herself staying longer than she ever expected.

As she begins to navigate life in this strange place, she gradually transforms… becoming someone she never imagined she could be.

🎬 Season 1 — A Complete Experience

Season 1 is a fully self-contained story collection.

It explores several of Lily’s possible futures through multiple distinct story routes — each with its own themes, tone, progression, and ending.

Every route is complete and satisfying on its own.
You do not need Season 2 to enjoy or understand the stories presented here.

Season 2 will expand the world of Grimwood further, introducing new transformation paths and additional directions for Lily’s evolution.

🎭 Your Choices Shape Her

In Grimwood, Lily will perform various favors for the village’s inhabitants, and each interaction subtly influences her path.

Many seek her attention — and it is entirely up to you how she responds.

Will she hold onto who she once was?
Will she adapt to her surroundings?
Or will she embrace a completely new version of herself?

✨ Features

  • 8–10 hours of content

  • 5000+ high-quality cinematic scenes

  • Multiple complete story paths with distinct endings

  • Gradual character and appearance progression

  • Meaningful player choice impact

  • Wide range of adult themes (listed below)

🔞 Adult Content May Include

Depending on your choices, scenes may contain:

  • Teasing 😉

  • Voyeurism 👀

  • Exhibitionism 🌶️

  • Erotic photoshoots 📸

  • Masturbation 💭

  • Handjobs 🤲

  • Oral sex 👄

  • Vaginal sex 🌸

  • Anal sex 🍑

  • Toys 🧸

  • Interracial sex 🌍

  • Group sex 👥

  • Spanking 👋

  • Humiliation 😈

  • Femdom 👠

  • Netorare / Cuckolding (initiated by Lily) 💔

 And more...

data.short_description: An adult slow-burn 🔥 visual novel about an innocent girl’s gradual descent — reflected in her changing appearance, mindset, behavior, and the relationships she builds along the way 💋
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 德文, 義大利文, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2
  • 顯示卡: 4 GB RAM
